calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Enjoining Defendants From Holding Elections And Appointing Officers And Directors
Off Calendar Oct-31-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. STANLEY SHEN, Esq. of Shen Law Firm (Tel: 415-661-6700) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JAYNRY W. MAK, Esq. (Tel: 415-307-9783) for defendants Samuel Wong, Wa Sin Wong, and Hua Dong Huang.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WONG FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION's Motion For Preliminary Injunction Enjoining Defendants From Holding Elections And Appointing Officers And Directors.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying plaintiff's motion for preliminary injunction. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-16-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAMUEL WONG, WA WONG, AND HUA HUANG's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint (FAC) is overruled. Defendants rely solely on Corporations Code 7527's nine-month limitation on "a challenge to an election." (Memo. 2:19-23.) But the FAC does not challenge the at-issue elections' validity; rather, it would uphold the elections. (FAC 6:1-8.) Thus, by the statute's plain language, the nine-month limitation does not apply.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SAMUEL WONG, WA WONG AND HUA HUANG's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41. At a minimum, plaintiff's counsel asserts - and defense counsel does not dispute - that the declaratory relief count was never discussed. (Shen Dec. 2:8-10; Mak Dec. 2:8-14.) The new response date is July 5.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SAMUEL WONG AND WA WONG's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for defendants' noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The demurrer may be re-set for a Monday-Thursday after May 15, 2024. Defendants' courtesy copies shall bear the new hearing date. Plaintiff need not re-file its papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
